title: NR28 0DS, British Pipeline Agency Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/RP3229SV/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit for:    Operator name: British Pipeline Agency   Installation name: BPA North Walsham Terminal   Permit number: EPR/RP3229SV/A001   "
